AboutBadgesDescription: Every merged PR earns achievement badges based on milestones. Unlock badges for your first PR, tenth PR, earnings milestones, and top leaderboard positions. Compete on the public leaderboard ranked by total earnings. All pull requests are public.
AboutCommunityDescription: PrTask powers a thriving global community of developers and clients collaborating across borders and time zones to build better software together.
AboutGetStartedDescription: Whether you are a developer looking for your next challenge or a client seeking top talent, PrTask connects you with the right people through the power of pull requests. Browse open tasks and start earning today.
AboutOpenSourceDescription: PrTask is built on and for the open-source ecosystem. We contribute back to the community, sponsor open-source maintainers, and ensure that every line of code submitted through our platform remains accessible. Our review process is public, our leaderboard is public, and our commitment to openness is unwavering.
AboutPaymentsDescription: Client bounty payments are processed via supported payment providers. When a client approves a pull request, they are automatically charged and the developer gets paid. No upfront deposit required. Developers choose their preferred payout method.
AboutStoryDescription: PrTask was founded with a simple idea: what if every code contribution had a clear, guaranteed bounty attached to it? Born from the frustration of unpaid open-source labor and opaque freelancing platforms, PrTask launched to create a marketplace where pull requests are the universal currency of work. From our first bounty to thousands of completed tasks, we have grown into a global community of developers and clients who share a commitment to transparent, merit-based collaboration.
AboutValueFairnessDescription: Compensation is tied directly to the work delivered. Code is reviewed on its merits, not on who wrote it. Every developer competes on a level playing field with equal opportunity.
AboutValueOpenSourceDescription: We champion open-source principles. All pull requests on PrTask are public, fostering knowledge sharing and community-driven quality standards across every project.
AboutValueTransparencyDescription: Every task, bounty, and payment is visible. Developers see exactly what they will earn before they start, and clients see exactly what they pay for. No hidden fees, no surprises.
DownloadAndroidDescription: Download the PrTask Android app to browse tasks, submit PRs, and track earnings on the go.
DownloadAndroidRequirements: Android 8.0 or later, 50 MB available storage
DownloadIosRequirements: iOS 15 or later, 50 MB available storage
DownloadLinuxDescription: Desktop app for Ubuntu, Fedora, and other distributions.
DownloadLinuxRequirements: Ubuntu 20.04+ or Fedora 36+, 100 MB available storage
DownloadVerificationDescription: All PrTask downloads are digitally signed and verified. Check the SHA-256 checksum after downloading to ensure file integrity.
DownloadWebAppDescription: Use PrTask directly in your browser.
DownloadWindowsDescription: Desktop app for Windows 10 and later.
DownloadWindowsRequirements: Windows 10 or later, 64-bit processor, 100 MB available storage
LoginSecurityDescription: PrTask uses OAuth-based SSO exclusively. We never store passwords. All payments are held in escrow until work is verified.
LoginWhyPrTaskDescription: PrTask connects developers with paid open-source and private tasks. Ship code, earn money, and build your portfolio.
PricingClientFeature1: Post unlimited tasks with custom bounties
PricingClientFeature4: Pay via credit card or supported payment method
PricingClientFeature5: Review and approve PRs before payout
PricingDevFeature1: Browse and claim tasks at no cost
PricingDevFeature2: Receive 100% of the bounty on each completed PR
PricingDevFeature4: Track your earnings and payout history
PricingDevFeature5: Get paid via your preferred payout method
PricingEnterpriseDescription: Need a tailored solution for your organization? We offer custom integrations, dedicated support, and volume-based arrangements for enterprise teams.
PricingGetStartedDescription: Join PrTask today and start earning or posting bounties. It is completely free.
PricingPaymentMethodsDescription: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and other supported payment providers. All payments are securely processed with industry-standard encryption.
PricingPayoutDescription: Developers can withdraw earnings via bank transfer, PayPal, or other supported payout methods. Payouts are typically processed within 3 to 5 business days after PR approval.
SettingsDepositDescription: Configure payment methods for posting task bounties.
SettingsDisbursementDescription: Configure how disbursements are processed for completed tasks.
SettingsInvoiceDescription: Configure invoice generation for your transactions.
